content.problemStatement:
There is a secret sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. We do not know the elements of this sequence, but we know another sequence B1,B2,…,BN−1B_1, B_2, \ldots, B_{N-1}B1​,B2​,…,BN−1​ such that Bi=Ai+Ai+1B_i = A_i + A_{i+1}Bi​=Ai​+Ai+1​ for each valid iii.

You should process QQQ queries. In each query, you are given two indices ppp and qqq; your task is to compute Ap+AqA_p + A_qAp​+Aq​ or determine that there is not enough information to uniquely determine this sum.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains N−1N-1N−1 space-separated integers B1,B2,…,BN−1B_1, B_2, \ldots, B_{N-1}B1​,B2​,…,BN−1​.
Each of the following QQQ lines contains two space-separated integers ppp and qqq describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, if it is impossible to determine the required sum, print a single line containing the string `"UNKNOWN"`. Otherwise, print a single line containing one integer — the required sum.
